user_feedback: the game start menu has no text at all, can you fix that? make sure you retain the text that is in the html, its just that the gaem start menu in the game canvas should have some text (don't add any game name though to the start menu)
analysis:
- Issue identified: The `renderStartScreen` function in `ui.js` currently only draws the background, resulting in a blank canvas when the game is in the "START" phase. The user expects text instructions to be displayed on the canvas itself, not just in the surrounding HTML.
- Files affected: ui.js
- Changes needed: Modify the `renderStartScreen` function to draw relevant start instructions ("Press ENTER to Start", "Use ARROWS to Rotate, SPACE to Flip") directly onto the p5.js canvas.
